# modificationDate

**Instance Property**

The date and time when the media group was last altered.

## Declaration

```swift
var modificationDate: Date? { get }
```

## Accessing Group Attributes

- **attributes**: A dictionary of attributes describing the media group.
- **name**: The name of the media group.
- **iconImage**: The media group’s icon.
- **url**: The location of the media group.
